hero.subtitle: Connect to SvxLink reflectors worldwide from your phone. VoxLink gives you push-to-talk access to any talkgroup — no extra hardware needed.
features.heading: Built for Radio
features.subheading: Everything you need to stay on the air, right from your pocket.
features.ptt.title: 3 PTT Modes
features.ptt.description: Latch, Hold, or VOX — transmit however feels natural. VOX includes a visual threshold slider so you can dial in sensitivity on the fly. Configurable timeout timer with vibration warning so you never overstay your turn.
features.opus.title: Opus Wideband Audio
features.opus.description: Crystal-clear 16 kHz Opus codec that handles network hiccups gracefully. Live RX/TX level meters, adjustable mic gain, multiple input sources, and output to speaker, earpiece, or Bluetooth.
features.multiServer.title: Multi-Server Profiles
features.multiServer.description: Save multiple reflector setups with talkgroup presets for each server. Label your favorites, reorder them, and switch instantly. Import and export configs as JSON to share with your club.
features.alwaysOn.title: Always On
features.alwaysOn.description: Stays connected in the background — no dropped connections when your screen is off or you switch apps. Automatically reconnects when your network changes between WiFi and cellular.
features.talkgroup.title: Talkgroup Monitoring
features.talkgroup.description: Listen to multiple talkgroups at once while staying on your primary. Pick which groups to monitor, and see their activity live on your PTT screen.
features.recording.title: Recording
features.recording.description: Record your QSOs with one tap. Browse, play back, and share saved recordings from a built-in library.
cta.heading: Get on the Air
cta.description: Free on Android, no account needed. Install VoxLink, add your reflector, and you're on the air.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.overview.title: Overview
privacy.overview.text: VoxLink is a push-to-talk client for SvxLink amateur radio reflectors. This policy explains what data the app accesses and how it is handled.
privacy.dataCollection.title: Data Collection
privacy.dataCollection.text: VoxLink does not collect, store, or transmit any personal data to the developer or any third party. The app contains no analytics, advertising, or tracking of any kind.
privacy.dataStored.title: Data Stored on Your Device
privacy.dataStored.intro: The app stores the following data locally on your device only:
privacy.dataStored.serverProfilesDesc: hostname, port, callsign, authentication key, and talkgroup settings you configure
privacy.dataStored.appPreferencesDesc: PTT mode, audio settings, UI preferences
privacy.dataStored.outro: This data never leaves your device except when connecting to the SvxLink reflector servers you configure.
privacy.microphone.title: Microphone
privacy.microphone.text: VoxLink accesses your device microphone solely for push-to-talk voice transmission to SvxLink reflector servers. Audio is encoded using the Opus codec and sent directly to the server you are connected to. Audio is not recorded, stored, or transmitted elsewhere. The user can choose to record audio, audio is kept strictly on the device, inside the app.
privacy.network.title: Network Communication
privacy.network.intro: VoxLink connects to SvxLink reflector servers that you configure. Communication uses:
privacy.network.tcpDesc: control connection (authentication, heartbeat, node list, talkgroup management)
privacy.network.outro: The app communicates only with servers you explicitly configure. No other network connections are made.
privacy.thirdParty.title: Third-Party Services
privacy.thirdParty.text: VoxLink does not use any third-party services, SDKs, or APIs. There are no ads, analytics, crash reporting, or cloud services.
privacy.reflectorServers.title: SvxLink Reflector Servers
privacy.reflectorServers.text: VoxLink connects to third-party SvxLink reflector servers operated by independent parties. The developer of VoxLink does not operate, control, or moderate these servers. Communication through these servers is real-time voice between connected users and is not moderated by VoxLink.
privacy.children.title: Children
privacy.children.text: VoxLink is not directed at children under 13. The app facilitates real-time voice communication between users.
privacy.changes.title: Changes
privacy.changes.text: This privacy policy may be updated. Changes will be posted at this URL with an updated date.
privacy.contact.title: Contact
privacy.contact.text: If you have questions about this privacy policy, contact:
